author: D23 RSS
text:
Disney+ News: Hoppers Now Streaming and New Simpsons Coming Soon

The hit Disney and Pixar animated film can now hop right onto your favorite streaming device—and to celebrate, Disney+ unveiled adorable new Hoppers avatars!

The post Disney+ News: <em>Hoppers</em> Now Streaming and New <em>Simpsons</em> Coming Soon appeared first on D23.
